meaning: n.先生(印度人对男子的尊称)
examples: Shri Mataji was born in 1923, many years before most of us.
Shri Mataji's words have been heard by great Numbers of people.
Perhaps qualities are the way. Wisdom. Compassion. Vision. Love. Shri Mataji is all these things. And more.
Shri Dilip S. Gadhavi, Executive Director, Gujarat Science City will preside over the meeting.
Shri Manas Ranjan Mahapatra, Editor, National Center for Children Literature of National Book Trust will inaugurate the programme.
